title: Oh The Dreams You'll Dream
description: Overhauls the sleeping mechanic in Minecraft, adds new beds with unique abilities and dreams.
body:
# Oh The Dreams You'll Dream

_I added dreaming to minecraft._

## About
This mod adds 2 new dimensions with new biomes, blocks, structures and world generation as well as 5 new bed variants each with unique abilities and a whole new adventure you can have in minecraft.

<details>
  <summary style="font-size: larger;">Show spoiler</summary>

### Getting started
When you first sleep in a vanilla bed you will get teleported into a dream. While in a dream are unable to access your ender chest, your inventory is randomized and everything goes goes back to normal once you wake up. *Anything you do in a dream has no consequences (except you get to keep some of loot)*.

### Dreams
Generally there are 4 types of dreams:
- Normal dream: *Teleports you to the normal "dream" dimension*
- Lucid dream: *Teleports you to the "dream" dimension and changes your game mode to creative*
- Challenge dream: *Spawns a structure with a challenge you need to complete, this is how you progress in the mod and unlock new beds*
- Nightmare: *Teleports you to the "nightmare" dimension*

### Beds
The mod currently has 2 level beds and another 2 beds with unique abilities. I plan to add more in the future.
- No Dream Bed: *When you sleep in this you don't dream*
- Vanilla Bed: *Allows you to dream challenges of level 1*
- Star Bed: *Allows you to dream challenges of level 2*
- Cloud Bed: *Allows you to dream challenges of level 3 and extends your dream time*
- Architect's Bed: *Guarantee a lucid dream and always teleports you to the same location and keeps changes you made*
- Pirate's Bed: *Extends time in the dream and makes more loot spawn*

</details>

## Credits
- **Potassiumola**: Thanks for letting me use your builds in the *sweet biome*. Check out their map [Candy Land Hunt](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/candy-land-hunt/)
- **Nordic_Studios**: Check out their *trivia* map [World Trivia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/world-trivia)
- **clockworkraven**: Pixel art icons [Raven Fantasy Icons](https://clockworkraven.itch.io/raven-fantasy-icons)
